# Piecewise Regression Models {piecewise-regression}

```{r piecewise-regression-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/piecewise-regression-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/piecewise-regression/"
)
```

```{r child-piecewise-regression, child="../lecture-content/18-piecewise-regression.Rmd"}
```
